meta.title: About us - OKTAFORCE
meta.description: Learn about OKTAFORCE, our mission, vision and values to reinvent remote concierge with artificial intelligence in Brazil.
meta.keywords: oktaforce, about us, mission, vision, values, remote concierge

hero.title: Global DNA, operation fully dedicated to Brazil
hero.subtitle: We combine international investment, proprietary technology and a local team that truly understands Brazilian condominiums.

story.title: Built to raise the security standard
paragraphs: OKTAFORCE was founded in 2021 by specialists in electronic security, data science and property management who were leading projects in North America and Brazil.

We identified a common pattern: sophisticated condominiums wanted to cut expenses without losing a strong sense of protection. The market was crowded with promises but lacked transparency. We decided to create a platform that merges proprietary AI, human-centric protocols and radical governance.

In 2023 we established our operations center in São Paulo with a Brazilian team, N+2 redundancy and strategic partnerships with security and technology firms. Since then we have grown alongside professional condo managers, administrators and investment groups that demand data, SLA and long-term partnership.

missionVision.mission: Deliver intelligent, sustainable and transparent security for condominiums ready to evolve beyond the traditional concierge model.
missionVision.vision: Become the benchmark for remote concierge and proactive risk management in Latin America by combining AI, specialized operations and seamless resident experience.

values.title: Continuous innovation
values.description: We evolve constantly, applying technology and practical intelligence to unlock better outcomes.

values.title: Trust and transparency
values.description: Every relationship is guided by ethics, clarity and accessible data for boards and residents.

values.title: Service excellence
values.description: Quality is present in every detail, from incident handling to 24/7 monitoring.

values.title: Agility and efficiency
values.description: Agile playbooks tailored to each property ensure the right response at the right time.

values.title: People first
values.description: We recognise collaborators, residents and partners as essential parts of our ecosystem.

values.title: Sustainability and future
values.description: We operate responsibly, respecting resources, communities and local regulations.

values.title: Security as a priority
values.description: We protect people, assets and data with proprietary technology and full redundancy.

values.title: Long-term partnership
values.description: We build lasting relationships with clear goals, measurable ROI and shared governance.

items.title: Research and prototyping
items.description: Founding team validates the concept of proactive concierge with AI and governance experts.

items.title: Investment and AI lab
items.description: We receive international funding and open a computer vision lab with a proprietary data lake.

items.title: Operations center in São Paulo
items.description: We launch the N+2 command center, certify operators and onboard the first premium condominiums.

items.title: Expansion and partnerships
items.description: Alliances with administrators, integrators and security consultants across SP, RJ, PR and DF.

team.title: Multidisciplinary team, shared outcomes
team.subtitle: 24/7 operation with dedicated tech squads, compliance specialists and customer success for every property.

pillars.title: Operations center
pillars.description: Certified operators, weekly drills, incident simulations and continuous performance reviews.

pillars.title: Engineering & AI
pillars.description: In-house developers, data scientists and infrastructure analysts managing the AI core, integrations and automations.

pillars.title: Customer success
pillars.description: Dedicated consultants per condominium, governance meetings, ROI reports and human support for boards and residents.

cta.title: Ready to turn your property into a security benchmark?
cta.subtitle: Talk to our strategic team, schedule a visit to the command center and see the platform in action.

items.title: Brazilian operations, global DNA
items.description: N+2 command center in São Paulo, local specialists and international investment for scale and proximity.

items.title: Radical transparency

items.title: Proprietary AI and resilient infrastructure

items.title: ROI-driven partnership
items.description: Dedicated customer success, governance meetings and evolution roadmaps for every condominium.
